events.title: patellofemoral pain syndrome
events.event_summary: Problem-oriented bundle for patellofemoral pain syndrome.
supporting_evidence: The patient has patellofemoral pain syndrome.
The doctor heard a regular heart rate and rhythm with no murmurs.
current_state: The patient has patellofemoral pain syndrome.
planned_actions: The patient will receive physical therapy.
The patient will take ibuprofen as needed.
care_context: The patient describes pain as deep and achy.
The patient reports pain when getting from a seated position to standing.
The patient reports pain when going up and down stairs.
The patient reports pain after watching TV.
